title: "Paul's Love For The Corinthians"  II Corinthians 12:11-19

notes.introduction: An exposition of 2 Corinthians 12:11-19 on the apostle Paul's love for the Corinthian church, set against the backdrop of Judaizer criticism and Paul's refusal to be a financial burden. Grounded in John 13, John 15, Romans 5:5, and Galatians 5, the message traces the example, the enabler, and the evidence of love as Christ loved.

sections.heading: The New Commandment to Love as Christ Loved
Jesus as the Example of Love
The Holy Spirit as the Enabler of Love
Evidence of Paul's Love: His Actions
Evidence of Paul's Love: His Words and Desires
Paul's Desire to Edify: Colossians and Thessalonians
